ConfigPage.label: AI Model config
ConfigPage.title: Your categories
ConfigPage.description: Create categories so the AI knows how to classify your expenses. Use the descriptions to explain what expenses belong to the category.
ConfigPage.placeholder: Add your configuration controls here—toggles, dropdowns, or any component you need.
ConfigPage.emptyState: No categories yet. Create the first one to get started.

errors.retry: Unable to load categories. Please try again.

CreateCategoryDialog.title: Create a new category
CreateCategoryDialog.description: Give the category a clear name. Add a description so the AI knows which expenses should it target.
CreateCategoryDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Expenses for outside activities like dining out, movies, concerts...
CreateCategoryDialog.descriptionHelper: You can specify expense concepts or other rules like 'Payments of Cool Bar under 10eur'
CreateCategoryDialog.generalError: Unable to create the category. Please try again.
